description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a global before_script to update git submodules with `git submodule update --init`. Define a single job named `make_os` that runs in the default test stage, uses the `make` command as its only script step, and is limited to runners tagged `rust`. The pipeline does not specify a Docker image, services, caches, artifacts, or any conditional rules, so it will execute on every pipeline run.
